summary: Soundboard recording marred by a noticeable glitch 56 seconds into “They Loved Each Other.”
review: The sole reviewer flags a clear audio fault early in the performance of “They Loved Each Other,” suggesting the tape has a drop‑out or distortion at that point. No other musical commentary is provided, so the show’s quality remains unknown beyond this technical issue.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a zero‑star rating highlighting a serious recording glitch; no positive information about the performance or other aspects.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Glitch/drop‑out at ~56 seconds into “They Loved Each Other”; otherwise no comments on clarity or mix.
